query:
SELECT b.*, h.hostName, h.hostEmail, h.address, h.pricePerPerson 
FROM bookings b 
JOIN host_listings h ON b.hostListingId = h.id 
WHERE b.paymentStatus = 'paid' 
ORDER BY b.paymentDate DESC 
LIMIT 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute SELECT b.*, h.hostName, h.hostEmail, h.address, h.pricePerPerson 
FROM bookings b 
JOIN host_listings h ON b.hostListingId = h.id 
WHERE b.paymentStatus = 'paid' 
ORDER BY b.paymentDate DESC 
LIMIT 1;
